vocabularies.definition: The first month of the year.
vocabularies.example: Which month does your school year start in? It starts in January.
quizzes: The new year begins on the first day of __________.
It is usually very cold in Northern countries during __________.
My birthday is in __________, which is the first month of the year.

vocabularies.definition: The eighth month of the year.
vocabularies.example: What's the eighth month? It is August.
quizzes: Many families go on holiday in __________, the last month of summer.
School often starts again in late __________ or September.
__________ is the eighth month of the calendar year.

vocabularies.definition: A big, fast road for cars and trucks to travel long distances.
vocabularies.example: Travelling by car on a motorway for a long time makes us tired.,
quizzes: You can drive much faster on the __________ than on small city streets.
The __________ was very busy with many trucks and cars travelling south.
We took the __________ to get to our grandmother's house more quickly.

vocabularies.definition: A special van that takes sick or hurt people to the hospital.
vocabularies.example: An ambulance takes people to the hospital.
quizzes: When there is a serious accident, we must call for an __________ immediately.
I heard the loud siren of an __________ racing towards the hospital.
The __________ arrived quickly to help the man who had fallen.

vocabularies.definition: The place in a station where you wait for a train.
vocabularies.example: We waited on the platform for the train.
quizzes: Our train leaves from __________ number five in ten minutes.
Please stand back from the edge of the __________ while the train is arriving.
The __________ was crowded with passengers waiting for the express train.

vocabularies.definition: The act of travelling from one place to another.
vocabularies.example: The journey was very long and difficult.,
quizzes: We brought many books and games to keep us busy during the long __________.
How long is the train __________ from London to Edinburgh?
The mountain __________ was difficult because of the heavy snow and ice.

vocabularies.definition: A person who is travelling in a car, bus, train or plane.
vocabularies.example: The passenger sat on the bus.
quizzes: There was only one __________ remaining on the bus when it reached the final stop.
The flight attendant asked every __________ to fasten their seatbelts.
A group of __________s waited patiently outside the airport terminal.

vocabularies.definition: The bags and suitcases you take when you travel.
vocabularies.example: He has a lot of luggage.
quizzes: We checked our heavy __________ at the airport counter before our flight.
It is much easier to travel when you don't have too much __________.
He carried his small piece of hand __________ onto the airplane.

grammars.description: Diễn tả khả năng một việc gì đó có thể xảy ra trong tương lai (không chắc chắn).
grammars.example:
I think it may be snowing.
My mum said it might be cold tomorrow.

grammars.description: Đại từ bất định dùng để chỉ người, vật hoặc nơi chốn không xác định (someone, anyone, no-one, everyone, something, anything, nothing, everything, somewhere, anywhere, nowhere, everywhere).
grammars.example:
I'm hungry. Have we got anything to eat?
I can't hear anyone in the house. No, there's no-one at home.

vocabularies.definition: A very large area of salt water.
vocabularies.example: This animal lives in the ocean. It's got eight 'arms and legs'.,
quizzes: Blue whales are the largest animals that live in the __________.
The Pacific is the largest and deepest __________ on Earth.
We spent our holiday near the __________, swimming and surfing every day.

vocabularies.definition: A large, dry area of land with very little water.
vocabularies.example: All of the deserts in Australia are huge.
quizzes: It is extremely hot in the __________ during the day but cold at night.
Very few plants can grow in the dry sand of the __________.
The Sahara is the largest hot __________ in the entire world.

vocabularies.definition: A sea animal with a soft body and eight long arms.
vocabularies.example: An octopus lives in the ocean.
quizzes: An __________ can change its color to hide from other sea creatures.
I saw an __________ with its eight long arms swimming through the coral.
The __________ is a very intelligent animal that lives deep in the sea.

vocabularies.definition: A large animal with one or two humps on its back that lives in the desert.
vocabularies.example: Camels are called 'ships of the desert'.
quizzes: A __________ can travel for many days in the desert without drinking water.
We went for a ride on a __________ across the beautiful sand dunes.
The __________ has thick fur to protect it from the hot desert sun.

vocabularies.definition: An animal with a hard shell that moves very slowly on land.
vocabularies.example: This green and brown animal is very slow. It's got a shell on its back.
quizzes: The old __________ crawled slowly across the grass in the back garden.
A __________ can live for over a hundred years if it is well cared for.
When it feels scared, the __________ pulls its head inside its hard shell.

vocabularies.definition: An insect with hard wings that cover its body.
vocabularies.example: A beetle is a small creature with six legs.
quizzes: I found a shiny black __________ crawling under a leaf in the woods.
The ladybird is a type of __________ that has spots on its bright shell.
Be careful not to step on that tiny __________ near the garden path.

vocabularies.definition: A small river of water flowing in a channel.
vocabularies.example: We went to some woods near the stream.
quizzes: The water in the shallow __________ was very cold and clear.
We sat by the __________ and watched the small fish swimming past.
It's fun to jump over the narrow __________ that runs through the field.

vocabularies.definition: When an animal or plant no longer exists anywhere in the world.
vocabularies.example: These animals are extinct. They lived long ago.
quizzes: Dinosaurs became __________ millions of years ago, long before humans existed.
Scientists are working hard to stop many endangered animals from becoming __________.
The dodo is a famous example of a bird that is now completely __________.

grammars.description: Ôn tập thì quá khứ đơn với động từ có quy tắc và bất quy tắc.
grammars.example: Last week we went on a school trip to the beach. We left after school on Friday.

grammars.description: Sử dụng 'too' (quá) và 'enough' (đủ) để mô tả tính chất hoặc số lượng.
grammars.example:
I like ice skating, but if you don't wear the right clothes it's too cold.
There isn't enough water.

vocabularies.definition: A competition to see who is the fastest.
vocabularies.example: People drive fast in racing cars to win a race.
quizzes: I managed to come in second place in the school's 100-meter __________.
The swimmers stood on the blocks, waiting for the start of the __________.
It was a very close __________, but Sarah won by just a few seconds.

vocabularies.definition: A board game for two people with black and white squares.
vocabularies.example: Chess is a board game with a king and queen.
quizzes: My grandfather is teaching me how to play __________ on Sunday afternoons.
To win at __________, you must try to capture your opponent's king.
It takes a lot of thinking and concentration to be a good __________ player.

vocabularies.meaning: câu đố / trò chơi ghép hình
vocabularies.definition: A game or problem that you have to think about hard to solve.
vocabularies.example: How did she finish the puzzle so quickly?
quizzes: I enjoy spending my free time doing a difficult crossword __________.
We spent the whole rainy afternoon completing a large jigsaw __________.
That riddle was a real __________; I couldn't figure out the answer at all.

vocabularies.definition: A performance of music by people such as singers or musicians.
vocabularies.example: Mum loved the concert. She danced all evening.
quizzes: We have tickets to see my favorite pop band in __________ next Saturday.
The classical music __________ at the town hall was absolutely beautiful.
Everyone cheered loudly when the singer walked onto the stage at the __________.

vocabularies.definition: A musical instrument that you play by hitting it with sticks or your hands.
vocabularies.example: The musician who played the drums was brilliant.
quizzes: He started to play the __________ so loudly that the floor began to shake.
The little boy enjoys hitting the __________ with his wooden sticks.
Can you hear the steady beat of the __________ coming from the music room?

vocabularies.definition: A musical instrument with four strings that you play with a bow.
vocabularies.example: The robot isn't playing the guitar, is it? No, it's playing the violin.,
quizzes: She has been practicing the __________ every morning for three years.
The sound of a __________ is very high and can be extremely sad or happy.
He carefully tucked the __________ under his chin and began to play.

vocabularies.definition: Something that you win in a competition or a game.
vocabularies.example: Did he win a prize for chess?
quizzes: The first __________ for the winners of the race was a shiny gold trophy.
He worked very hard on his science project and won a special __________.
What is the __________ for the person who finds the hidden golden egg?

grammars.description: Thì hiện tại hoàn thành để nói về trải nghiệm (Have you ever...?).
grammars.example:
Have you ever eaten black beans?
I haven't seen the pyramids yet.,

grammars.structure: Present perfect with just, already, yet
grammars.description: Thì hiện tại hoàn thành đi kèm với 'just' (vừa mới), 'already' (đã... rồi), 'yet' (chưa).
grammars.example:
I haven't sent him the email yet.
We've just visited Frank's grandma.
I've already done my homework.

vocabularies.definition: To go to another place to get something and bring it back.
vocabularies.example: Mum's just fetched Grandma from the station.
quizzes: The dog loves to run across the field to __________ the wooden stick I throw.
Could you please go and __________ my glasses from the living room table?
I'll go and __________ some more water for everyone from the kitchen.

vocabularies.definition: To make a place look neat by putting things in the correct place.
vocabularies.example: I was tidying my room when Grandma phoned.
quizzes: Please __________ your toys and put them back in the box before dinner.
It will take me about ten minutes to __________ the living room for our guests.
The teacher asked all the students to __________ their desks before they left.

vocabularies.definition: To fix something that is broken or not working.
vocabularies.example: My dad's going to repair my bike.
quizzes: The mechanic said he can __________ my father's car engine by tomorrow afternoon.
Is it possible to __________ this broken watch, or do I need to buy a new one?
We need to __________ the hole in the fence so the dog doesn't get out.

vocabularies.definition: Fifteen minutes before an hour.
vocabularies.example: He ate cereal for breakfast at quarter to ten.
quizzes: The bus arrives at __________ __________ nine, so we need to leave soon.
It is exactly __________ __________ seven, which means it's 6:45.
I usually wake up at __________ __________ eight on school mornings.

vocabularies.definition: Thirty minutes after an hour.
vocabularies.example: At half past nine, the managers went to a big office.
quizzes: We are meeting our friends for lunch at __________ __________ twelve.
The movie starts at __________ __________ eight in the evening.
I usually have my dinner at __________ __________ six every day.

grammars.description: Thì quá khứ tiếp diễn diễn tả hành động đang xảy ra tại một thời điểm trong quá khứ.
grammars.example:
While I was cleaning my bike, my sister was watching TV.
I was looking after my little brother when we saw our maths teacher.,

grammars.description: Thì hiện tại hoàn thành dùng với 'since' (mốc thời gian) và 'for' (khoảng thời gian).
grammars.example:
She's lived here for six months.
I haven't been to school since 21st June.

vocabularies.definition: The coldest season of the year, between autumn and spring.
vocabularies.example: This is the coldest season.
quizzes: I love playing in the thick white snow during the cold __________ months.
We need to wear heavy coats and warm scarves when __________ arrives.
__________ is the time of year when some animals go into a long sleep.

vocabularies.definition: When there is a lot of thick, low clouds that make it hard to see.
vocabularies.example: There was a lot of fog. It was very foggy.
quizzes: It was so __________ outside this morning that I could only see a few meters ahead.
Drivers must go very slowly and use their lights when the weather is __________.
The golden bridge looked beautiful emerging from the __________ and damp morning air.

vocabularies.definition: A period of very bad weather with heavy rain, strong winds, and often lightning and thunder.
vocabularies.example: When there's a storm with a lot of wind and rain, the sea is very dangerous.
quizzes: We stayed safely inside the house while the loud thunder of the __________ rolled past.
A powerful __________ with very strong winds blew down several old trees in the park.
Is it going to be a big __________ tonight? I can see bright lightning in the distance.

vocabularies.definition: An object used for travelling over snow and ice.
vocabularies.example: We sit on this to go down a hill fast when there's snow. It's a sledge.
quizzes: The children took their wooden __________ to the top of the snowy hill to slide down.
It is so much fun to race your friends on a __________ when it snows in winter.
We pulled the heavy __________ behind us as we walked through the deep, white snow.

vocabularies.definition: Clothing worn on the hands to keep them warm or protect them.
vocabularies.example: We wear these on our hands to keep them warm.
quizzes: I need to find my warm woolly __________ because my fingers are feeling very cold.
The gardener always wears thick leather __________ to protect his hands from thorns.
Don't forget to put on your __________ before you go outside to build a snowman.

vocabularies.definition: The sport or activity of moving over snow on skis.
vocabularies.example: This sport may sometimes be dangerous because it's fast. You go down a mountain with snow.
quizzes: We go __________ in the Alps every February during the school half-term holiday.
Is __________ more difficult than snowboarding for a beginner to learn?
He broke his leg while he was __________ down a very steep and icy mountain slope.

grammars.description: Thì tương lai đơn để đưa ra dự đoán hoặc lời hứa.
grammars.example:
I'll water their garden.
We won't talk about football.
Don't worry Mum, I'll tidy my bedroom after lunch.,

It was very hot, so I went for a swim.
I made a snowman because there was a lot of snow.

vocabularies.definition: A person who is in charge of a shop, office, or team.
vocabularies.example: At half past nine, the managers went to a big office to have a meeting.
quizzes: The store __________ helped me find the correct size for the blue shoes I wanted.
Our football __________ decided to change the team's strategy for the second half.
If you have a problem with your meal, you can ask to speak with the restaurant __________.

vocabularies.definition: A person who fixes machines, especially car engines.
vocabularies.example: Helen's Uncle Robert is a mechanic.
quizzes: The __________ spent two hours repairing the broken engine of our family car.
My brother wants to become a __________ because he loves learning how machines work.
We took the car to the local __________ to have the brakes checked before our trip.

vocabularies.definition: A person who takes photos with a camera.
vocabularies.example: Many journalists work with a photographer.,
quizzes: The professional __________ took some beautiful pictures of the bride and groom.
I want to be a nature __________ so I can travel the world taking photos of animals.
A famous __________ is coming to our school to take the official class photos today.

vocabularies.definition: A person who works in a restaurant and brings food to the table.
vocabularies.example: Waiters work in a restaurant.
quizzes: The polite __________ brought us our drinks and then took our order for dinner.
We gave the __________ a small tip because the service was very fast and friendly.
A __________ in a white apron walked past us carrying three large plates of pasta.

vocabularies.definition: A hard hat that protects your head.
vocabularies.example: Firefighters wear a helmet as part of a uniform.
quizzes: You must always wear a __________ to protect your head when you ride a motorcycle.
The construction worker put on his yellow __________ before entering the building site.
Make sure your bicycle __________ is fastened correctly before you start cycling.

vocabularies.definition: A large building where machines are used to make things.
vocabularies.example: Robots make cars in a factory.
quizzes: My uncle works in a large __________ that produces parts for airplanes and helicopters.
The old __________ chimney was pouring out thick grey smoke into the sky.
Many clothes are now made in a __________ using very fast and modern machines.

grammars.description: Câu hỏi đuôi để xác nhận thông tin.
grammars.example:
You eat everything, don't you?
You can cycle, can't you?
They aren't in Australia, are they?,

grammars.description: Câu hỏi ngắn để thể hiện sự quan tâm hoặc ngạc nhiên.
grammars.example:
'I didn't go to the bank on Friday morning.' 'Didn't you?'
'It was my twin brother.' 'Was it?'

vocabularies.definition: A door-like structure in a fence or wall outside.
vocabularies.example: Frank didn't paint all of the gate because there wasn't any more paint.
quizzes: Please remember to close the garden __________ so the dog doesn't run out.
He stood at the school __________ and waited for his mother to pick him up.
The old iron __________ was very heavy and made a loud creaking sound when opened.

vocabularies.definition: A flat board fixed to a wall or in a cupboard for putting things on.
vocabularies.example: Betty ran in and jumped on the shelf because she was frightened.
quizzes: I put my favorite books on the top __________ so they are easy to find.
Could you please reach up and get the blue bowl from the highest __________?
The __________ was full of old dusty trophies and family photographs.

vocabularies.definition: A liquid soap used for washing your hair.
vocabularies.example: What's shampoo used for? It's used for washing your hair.
quizzes: I need to buy some more __________ because I've used the whole bottle.
Be careful not to get any __________ in your eyes while you are washing your hair.
This herbal __________ smells like fresh flowers and makes my hair feel very soft.

vocabularies.definition: A flat piece of plastic or wood with teeth, used for making hair neat.
vocabularies.example: What are combs used for? They're used for combing your hair.
quizzes: She used a plastic __________ to make her long hair look neat and tidy before school.
I can't find my green __________; I think I left it in the bathroom this morning.
A __________ has many small teeth that help get the tangles out of your hair.

vocabularies.definition: Costing a lot of money.
vocabularies.example: She bought her camera for only 20 euros. It was really expensive (incorrect context in exercise, implies checking meaning).
quizzes: That new sports car is very __________, and only very rich people can buy it.
It is much more __________ to travel by plane than to go by bus or train.
I want to buy those shoes, but they are too __________ for me right now.

grammars.description: Quá khứ phân từ của các động từ (V3/ed) (break -> broken, eat -> eaten).
grammars.example:
It was used for cooking food.
Michael's just swum 200 metres.,

grammars.description: Cấu trúc chỉ công dụng của vật: be used for + V-ing / be used to + V-inf.
grammars.example:
It was used for cooking food.
People used soap to wash their clothes.,

vocabularies.definition: A person who is trained to travel into space.
vocabularies.example: An astronaut travels in space.
quizzes: The brave __________ stepped out of the rocket and onto the dusty surface of the moon.
It takes many years of difficult training to become a professional __________.
Every __________ must learn how to live and work in zero gravity.

vocabularies.definition: A vehicle used for travelling to space.
vocabularies.example: Ivan landed his rocket on the new planet.,
quizzes: The powerful __________ blasted off from the launchpad with a loud roar of fire.
Scientists are designing a new __________ that can carry people all the way to Mars.
We watched the __________ disappear into the blue sky until it was just a tiny dot.

vocabularies.definition: A very large round object that moves around a star, such as Earth.
vocabularies.example: Earth, Jupiter and Mars are all planets.
quizzes: Earth is the only __________ in our solar system known to have liquid water.
Mars is often called the 'Red __________' because of its rusty-colored soil.
Which __________ is the closest to the sun? I think it is Mercury.

vocabularies.definition: Very large in size or amount.
vocabularies.example: Enormous is another word for huge.
quizzes: The blue whale is an __________ animal that can grow up to 30 meters long.
We found an __________ footprint in the mud that must belong to a very large creature.
They lived in an __________ house with twenty bedrooms and a giant swimming pool.

vocabularies.definition: A vehicle for travelling in space.
vocabularies.example: Spaceships will improve.
quizzes: The shiny silver __________ glided silently through the dark and empty space.
In my favorite movie, the __________ can travel faster than the speed of light.
The captain sat in the cockpit of the __________ and looked out at the distant stars.

grammars.description: Phân biệt 'will' (dự đoán, quyết định tức thì) và 'going to' (kế hoạch, dự định có căn cứ).
grammars.example:
Spaceships will improve.
Are you going to watch space films?

grammars.description: Ôn tập các thì quá khứ trong ngữ cảnh kể chuyện.
grammars.example: Ivan landed his rocket on the new planet. He was turning off his engine when he heard a strange noise.

vocabularies.definition: Very pleasant to eat or smell.
vocabularies.example: These biscuits taste like oranges and coconuts. They're delicious!
quizzes: My mother made a __________ chocolate cake for my birthday party last weekend.
The smell of the fresh bread coming from the bakery was absolutely __________.
This hot soup is very __________; could I please have another bowl?

vocabularies.definition: A round container used for holding food or liquid.
vocabularies.example: First, mix the butter and sugar in a large bowl.
quizzes: He poured some milk into a cereal __________ and then added the cornflakes.
Please pass me that large glass __________ so I can mix the salad ingredients.
I ate a hot __________ of spicy noodles for my lunch today.

vocabularies.definition: An object with a small bowl at the end of a handle, used for eating or stirring.
vocabularies.example: Use a wooden spoon.
quizzes: I used a small silver __________ to stir the honey into my hot tea.
She used a big wooden __________ to stir the thick vegetable soup in the pot.
Don't forget to put a __________ on the table so I can eat my soup.

vocabularies.definition: A powder made from grain, used for making bread, cakes, etc.
vocabularies.example: Then slowly add the flour and mix it all together.
quizzes: We need several kilograms of white __________ to bake all these loaves of bread.
Sift the __________ into the bowl to make sure there are no lumps in the cake mix.
The baker's hands were covered in white __________ after he finished kneading the dough.

vocabularies.definition: A piece of equipment that you use for cooking food.
vocabularies.example: Put them carefully into the oven.
quizzes: The delicious smell of roasting chicken filled the kitchen as it cooked in the __________.
Remember to wear thick gloves before taking the hot baking tray out of the __________.
My grandmother is baking a fresh cherry pie in the __________ right now.

vocabularies.definition: A thick, creamy food made from milk.
vocabularies.example: This fridge is only for one food - kimchi... no milk, no cheese and no yoghurts.,
quizzes: I usually have a small pot of strawberry __________ with my breakfast every morning.
Greek __________ is very thick and creamy and tastes great with fresh honey.
She mixed some blue berries into her plain white __________ to make it more interesting.

grammars.description: Động từ chỉ giác quan + like (smells like, tastes like, looks like, feels like, sounds like).
grammars.example:
It felt like dry grass.
It smelt like carrot cake.
It looked like a nest.

grammars.description: Cấu trúc 'make' khiến ai đó cảm thấy thế nào.
grammars.example:
The smell's making me hungry.
Watching bad news on TV made my dad unhappy.,
